items.text: 🚨 SPACEX STOCK SOARS AFTER BLOCKBUSTER DEBUT SpaceX shares continued their impressive market run, rising 16% after a record-breaking IPO debut. The surge added nearly $340 billion in market value, pushing the company above a $2.4 trillion valuation and strengthening Elon Musk’s
🚨 $SPCX - *SPACEX SHARES EXTEND GAINS TO 10% IN SECOND DAY OF TRADING
🚨 BINANCE HOLDS OVER 60% MARKET SHARE OF SPACEX PERPETUAL FUTURES
🚨 $SPCX - SPACEX IPO RAISES TOTAL OF $85.7 BILLION AS UNDERWRITERS EXERCISE 'GREENSHOE' OVERALLOTMENT OPTION - CNBC
🚨 $SPCX - SPACEX SURGES PREMARKET SPCX is up ~6% in premarket trading. $SPCH and $SSPC are new daily leveraged ETFs tied to SpaceX: SPCH targets +2x daily returns, while SSPC targets -2x.
🚨 RON BARON BOUGHT $1 BILLION OF SPACEX SHARES IN IPO, LIFTING STAKE TO $25 BILLION - CNBC

🚨 $SPCX - SPACEX TARGETS $1 TRILLION REVENUE Elon Musk said SpaceX could generate $1 trillion in revenue by 2030. The projection comes just days after the company went public, reaching a valuation above $2 trillion.
🚨 MSCI: SPACEX ADDED TO STANDARD AND LARGE CAP INDEXES
🚨 $SPCX - SPACEX SHARES JUMP TO SESSION HIGH OF $169, 25% ABOVE IPO PRICE

🚨 SPACE X IPO BANK FEES TOP $500 MILLION SpaceX’s IPO will generate about $500 million in total fees, or roughly 0.7% of the $75 billion raise. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are expected to earn about $100 million each, taking the largest share. Bank of America, Citigroup, and
🚨 SPACEX OPTIONS TO BEGIN TRADING ON TUESDAY AFTER IPO
🚨 $SPCX - SPACEX : CFRA INITIATES COVERAGE WITH SELL RATING; TARGET PRICE $115

🚨 SPACEX JOINS U.S. MEGA-CAP RANKING At a valuation of $2.12 trillion, SpaceX would rank among the largest U.S. companies: 🔸 Nvidia — $4.96T 🔸 Alphabet — $4.40T 🔸 Apple — $4.29T 🔸 Microsoft — $2.88T 🔸 Amazon — $2.54T 🔸 SpaceX — $2.12T 🔸 Broadcom — $1.80T 🔸 Meta — $1.44T

🚨 $SPCX - CITADEL HANDLES RECORD RETAIL IPO ORDERS Citadel Securities said it processed a record number of retail orders during an IPO auction, based on its internal data. The firm described the activity as the largest retail order flow it has handled for an IPO auction to date.
